title: Virtue Ethics and Moral Character
description: See how virtue ethics reframes judgments in terms of character.

steps.text: You promised to return a borrowed weapon, but doing so could cause harm.

steps.prompt: What would a virtuous person do?

steps.text: Virtue ethics prioritizes traits like practical wisdom, courage, and care.
Virtue ethics centers moral evaluation on character and flourishing.

steps.notes: Check coherence between your judgment and the virtue framing.

steps.text: Introduce promise-keeping to compare duty and character.

steps.prompt: Would you revise your judgment after weighing character and duty?
